# v0.1.0 — Foundation Release

**Release Date:** April 2026

---

## 🚀 Overview

This release introduces the foundational structure and documentation for the KingKen Global Recruitment Platform.

It marks the transition from initial setup to a structured, scalable development environment.

---

## ✨ Added

- Initial repository documentation structure
  - `README.md` — project overview
  - `ARCHITECTURE.md` — system design baseline
  - `DEVELOPMENT.md` — development guidelines
  - `docs/SETUP_GUIDE.md` — setup instructions
  - `ops/ROLLOUT_CHECKLIST.md` — deployment checklist
  - `.github/FUNDING.yml` — funding configuration

---

## 🔄 Changed

- Renamed instructions file to `v0.1.0-release-notes.md`
- Standardized documentation format across repository

---

## 🛠️ Fixed

- Removed incorrect wildcard filename usage (`*.instructions.md`)
- Corrected references to non-existent files and directories

---

## 📌 Notes

- This release focuses on documentation and structure only.
- No functional application features are included yet.

---

## 🔮 Next Release

**v0.2.0** will introduce:

- Worker registration system
- Admin dashboard
- Employer request system
- Deployment to live environment
